html:
Exclusive to:

“Creates a flash in the sky that can be seen by all survivors on the minimap.

This large flash will also draw the attention of some hostile creatures.”

-

The Hostile Flare is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Tools Filter, and requires 3 Flares and 1 Glommer's Goop to craft, and does not need to be prototyped.

When placed on the ground and lit on fire, the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It creates three flare marks on the map, unlike a normal Flare, which only creates one mark.

Additionally, the Hostile Flare has a chance to spawn specific enemies under certain conditions:

  • When used on land during Winter and while Deerclops is not currently alive, there is a 60% chance to spawn Deerclops near the Hostile Flare.
  • When used on land during Winter and when there is an existing MacTusk hunting party in the world, there is a 60% chance to move the hunting party near the Hostile Flare.
    • Both of these events can happen from the same Hostile Flare if all conditions are met.
  • When used on a Boat with no Monkey Pirates nearby, there is a 60% chance to trigger a Pirate Raid.

Rift Content

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Player can activate a Hostile Flare to shoot down up to 5 nearby Crystal-Crested Buzzards at once.

Tips

  • Players can use the Hostile Flare to fight Deerclops more than once per Winter season, with the goal to acquire more than one Deerclops Eyeball. This allows for crafting of several Eyebrellas and Houndius Shootius without the need to wait for subsequent Winters.
    • If the Hostile Flare is used to summon and kill Deerclops, it will reset its spawn timer of 71.8 days.
  • Deerclops deals a good amount of damage to all creatures in an area, so summoning it can be helpful for thinning out hordes of creatures like Spiders and Beefalo. Deerclops's health is low enough that even if it kills all the creatures around it, it will likely be severely injured and easy to finish off.
    • Unfortunately, the low health makes Deerclops generally unhelpful for fighting with much higher health, such as Dragonfly and Bee Queen.

Trivia

  • The Hostile Flare was added as part of the Wickerbottom Character Refresh update.

Gallery

  • Lit Flare Small Map Icon.

"megaflare"
“It will let everything know I'm here. Everything.”
–Wilson
“Heheh... let's start some trouble!”
–Willow
“Wolfgang will be careful with that one.”
–Wolfgang
“I could just let the monsters come for me...”
–Wendy
“MINION! TAKE THIS FAR AWAY AND SET IT OFF”
–WX-78
“I can lure adversaries to a place of my choosing.”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll definitely get someone... or something's attention.”
–Woodie
“I'd have to be foolish or desperate to use that.”
–Maxwell
“I fear nö enemy. Let them cöme!”
–Wigfrid
“Ms. Wickerbottom says we shouldn't pick fights...”
–Webber
“I seem to be developing a taste for danger.”
–Warly
“Makes big angry light”
–Wormwood
“If I'm gonna start somethin', I'd better be ready to finish it.”
–Winona
“Hyuyuyu, this might get interesting!”
–Wortox
“Make big angry sparks in sky.”
–Wurt
“We don't want anyone feeling left out, right Woby?”
–Walter
“I'm not too keen on drawing unwanted attention.”
–Wanda
“Creates a flash in the sky that can be seen by all survivors on the minimap.
This large flash will also draw the attention of some hostile creatures.”
-
The Hostile Flare is a craftable item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Tools Filter, and requires 3 Flares and 1 Glommer's Goop to craft, and does not need to be prototyped.
When placed on the ground and lit on fire, the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It creates three flare marks on the map, unlike a normal Flare, which only creates one mark.
Additionally, the Hostile Flare has a chance to spawn specific enemies under certain conditions:
When used on land during Winter and while Deerclops is not currently alive, there is a 60% chance to spawn Deerclops near the Hostile Flare.
When used on land during Winter and when there is an existing MacTusk hunting party in the world, there is a 60% chance to move the hunting party near the Hostile Flare.
Both of these events can happen from the same Hostile Flare if all conditions are met.
When used on a Boat with no Monkey Pirates nearby, there is a 60% chance to trigger a Pirate Raid.
Rift Content[edit | edit source]
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Player can activate a Hostile Flare to shoot down up to 5 nearby Crystal-Crested Buzzards at once.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Players can use the Hostile Flare to fight Deerclops more than once per Winter season, with the goal to acquire more than one Deerclops Eyeball. This allows for crafting of several Eyebrellas and Houndius Shootius without the need to wait for subsequent Winters.
If the Hostile Flare is used to summon and kill Deerclops, it will reset its spawn timer of 71.8 days.
Deerclops deals a good amount of damage to all creatures in an area, so summoning it can be helpful for thinning out hordes of creatures like Spiders and Beefalo. Deerclops's health is low enough that even if it kills all the creatures around it, it will likely be severely injured and easy to finish off.
Unfortunately, the low health makes Deerclops generally unhelpful for fighting with much higher health, such as Dragonfly and Bee Queen.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Hostile Flare was added as part of the Wickerbottom Character Refresh update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ngọn lửa thù địch là một vật phẩm chế tạo độc quyền cho Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Công cụ và cần 3 Pháo sáng và 1 Glommer's Goop để chế tạo và không cần phải tạo nguyên mẫu.
title: Hostile Flare

This large flash will also draw the attention of some hostile creatures.}} The '''Hostile Flare''' is a craftable item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Tools Filter]], and requires 3 [[Flare|Flares]] and 1 [[Glommer's Goop/DST|Glommer's Goop]] to craft, and does not need to be prototyped. When placed on the ground and lit on fire, the Flare will shoot up into the sky. It creates three flare marks on the map, unlike a normal Flare, which only creates one mark. Additionally, the Hostile Flare has a chance to spawn specific enemies under certain conditions: * When used on land during [[Seasons/Winter|Winter]] and while [[Deerclops/DST|Deerclops]] is not currently alive, there is a 60% chance to spawn Deerclops near the Hostile Flare. * When used on land during Winter and when there is an existing [[MacTusk N' Son|MacTusk]] hunting party in the world, there is a 60% chance to move the hunting party near the Hostile Flare. ** Both of these events can happen from the same Hostile Flare if all conditions are met. * When used on a [[Boat]] with no [[Powder Monkey|Monkey Pirates]] nearby, there is a 60% chance to trigger a [[Pirate Raid]]. ==Rift Content== {{Rift Content|Lunar}} Player can activate a Hostile Flare to shoot down up to 5 nearby [[Crystal-Crested Buzzard|Crystal-Crested Buzzards]] at once. == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * Players can use the Hostile Flare to fight Deerclops more than once per Winter season, with the goal to acquire more than one [[Deerclops Eyeball/DST|Deerclops Eyeball]]. This allows for crafting of several [[Eyebrella/DST|Eyebrellas]] and [[Houndius Shootius/DST|Houndius Shootius]] without the need to wait for subsequent Winters. ** If the Hostile Flare is used to summon and kill Deerclops, it will reset its spawn timer of 71.8 days. * Deerclops deals a good amount of damage to all creatures in an area, so summoning it can be helpful for thinning out hordes of creatures like [[Spider/DST|Spiders]] and [[Beefalo/DST|Beefalo]]. Deerclops's health is low enough that even if it kills all the creatures around it, it will likely be severely injured and easy to finish off. ** Unfortunately, the low health makes Deerclops generally unhelpful for fighting [[Category:Boss Monsters/other bosses]] with much higher health, such as [[Dragonfly/DST|Dragonfly]] and [[Bee Queen]]. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Hostile Flare was added as part of the [[Don't Starve Together/Version_History/2022#August_4,_2022_-_Wickerbottom_Character_Update|Wickerbottom Character Refresh]] update. == {{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Lit Flare Small Map Icon.png|Lit Flare Small Map Icon. __NOTOC__ {{Craftable Items}} [[Category:Tools Filter]] [[ru:Вражеская сигнальная ракета]] [[vi:Hostile Flare]]
